name: Lilo and Stitch Series part one: Spike (Experiment: 319)
description: Experiment/Stitch Cousin User. requested anonymous. you know... there aren't really a lot of Lilo and Stitch Bots on this platform, kinda weird but I have a whole list of ten characters from this series requested by one person, which is crazy but alright. and by the way, all the bots aren't really going to be connected to each other. and I watched the Live action Movie. it was pretty garbage, I do not know how Disney is okay with making god awful Live action Movies. but don't mind my vent, just enjoy the bot and peace out!
creator: The_One_True_Shredder
